Tulsa's Trusted Contractor

Building and renovating Tulsa homes with integrity. Quality craftsmanship, reliable service, and lasting results.

Call Now: +19182779972

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Building Tulsa, One Project at a Time

Renovation & Construction Services, LLC was founded over a decade ago right here in Tulsa. We started with a simple mission: to provide homeowners with reliable, high-quality construction and renovation services they could trust. From small repairs to full-scale remodels, we treat every project with the same level of care and attention.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned
Licensed & Insured

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our general contractor services.

How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?

The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 4-8 weeks. We'll provide you with a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

Do I need to move out during the remodel?

While it's not always necessary, it can make the process more comfortable. We'll work with you to minimize disruption and keep you informed throughout the project.

Can you help me with design ideas?

Absolutely! Our team has extensive experience in kitchen design and can provide you with creative solutions to maximize space and functionality.

Reviews From Our General Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Renovation & Construction Services, LLC did an amazing job remodeling our kitchen! They helped us design a space that was both beautiful and functional. The team was professional, courteous, and always kept us informed throughout the process. We highly recommend them!"

Sarah M. Kitchen Remodel

"We had a leaky roof after a recent storm, and Renovation & Construction Services, LLC responded quickly and efficiently. They were able to identify the problem and make the necessary repairs in a timely manner. We were very impressed with their professionalism and expertise."

David K. Roof Repair

"I absolutely love my new bathroom! Renovation & Construction Services, LLC transformed my outdated bathroom into a spa-like retreat. The quality of their work is exceptional, and they paid close attention to every detail. I couldn't be happier!"

Jennifer L. Bathroom Remodel
